channel.title: Reka AI
channel.description: Reka AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Reka and Moonvalley Join Forces to Advance Models and Infrastructure for Physical AI
item.description: San Francisco, CA — June 4 — Reka, an AI research lab building foundational intelligence for the physical world, has joined forces with Moonvalley, adding a team of 50 multimodal AI researchers and engineers to accelerate development of next-generation video AI and physical reasoning capabilities.

item.title: PhysicalRealismBench
item.description: We release PhysicalRealismBench-U, a physics-first benchmark for evaluating physical understanding in VLMs — built on synthetic data with known ground truth, so anyone can measure how well their models reason about physics.
